user_query: I'm planning a surprise anniversary party for my parents. Can you assist me in sending SMS invitations to their friends and relatives? Additionally, I want to validate their phone numbers to ensure they are accurate. Also, I need to check the balance on my D7API account.

TaskList.description: Collect phone numbers of friends and relatives for sending SMS invitations.
Validate the collected phone numbers to ensure they are accurate.
Compose the SMS invitation message to be sent to the contacts.
Send SMS invitations to the validated phone numbers.
Check the balance on the D7API account to ensure sufficient credits for sending SMS.
